title: Bi Hotbar & XP Bar
description: Hotbar changed into the colors of the Bi pride flag!
body:
**Bi color palette GUI!!!**

This edit changes the textures of the following things:

-Hotbar
-Hotbar Selection Slot
-Offhand Slot
-XP Bar

_NOTE: There is a folder in the resource pack that includes an opaque version of the hotbar. I personally think that the one with the transparent slots looks better but I decided to keep the opaque one in here!_
